creator: tj+freebsd_bugs@a13.fr
text:
(In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #9)

Thanks again for the tips.

You convinced me to focus work on 0.17, even if it seems less stable
(right now), it has more features, and some which were broken in 0.16
are now usable.
I want to give it more chance and continue testing/fixing, also
because work done with 0.16 would have to be "migrated" under 0.17 (at
least for Part Design module).
